mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, level, power, fame, rank_name AS rankName, ranking, nation, today_challenge AS todayChallenge, today_wins AS todayWins, today_purchased AS todayPurchased, last_reset_date AS lastResetDate, last_challenge_time AS lastChallengeTime, pending_fame AS pendingFame, pending_silver AS pendingSilver, pending_exp AS pendingExp, reward_claimed AS rewardClaimed, settle_date AS settleDate, update_time AS updateTime FROM hero_rank WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hero_rank (user_id, user_name, level, power, fame, rank_name, ranking, rank_position, nation, today_challenge, today_wins, today_purchased, last_reset_date, last_challenge_time, pending_fame, pending_silver, pending_exp, reward_claimed, settle_date, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{level}, #{power}, #{fame}, #{rankName}, #{ranking}, #{ranking}, #{nation}, #{todayChallenge}, #{todayWins}, #{todayPurchased}, #{lastResetDate}, #{lastChallengeTime}, #{pendingFame}, #{pendingSilver}, #{pendingExp}, #{rewardClaimed}, #{settleDate}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_name = #{userName}, level = #{level}, power = #{power}, fame = #{fame}, rank_name = #{rankName}, ranking = #{ranking}, rank_position = #{ranking}, nation = #{nation}, today_challenge = #{todayChallenge}, today_wins = #{todayWins}, today_purchased = #{todayPurchased}, last_reset_date = #{lastResetDate}, last_challenge_time = #{lastChallengeTime}, pending_fame = #{pendingFame}, pending_silver = #{pendingSilver}, pending_exp = #{pendingExp}, reward_claimed = #{rewardClaimed}, settle_date = #{settleDate}, update_time = #{updateTime}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, level, power, fame, rank_name AS rankName, ranking FROM hero_rank ORDER BY ranking ASC
SELECT user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, level, power, fame, rank_name AS rankName, ranking FROM hero_rank ORDER BY power DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE hero_rank SET ranking = #{ranking}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE hero_rank SET reward_claimed = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hero_rank_battle (attacker_id, attacker_name, attacker_level, defender_id, defender_name, defender_level, victory, fame_gain, atk_old_rank, atk_new_rank, def_old_rank, def_new_rank, battle_report, create_time, create_date) VALUES (#{attackerId}, #{attackerName}, #{attackerLevel}, #{defenderId}, #{defenderName}, #{defenderLevel}, #{victory}, #{fameGain}, #{atkOldRank}, #{atkNewRank}, #{defOldRank}, #{defNewRank}, #{battleReport}, #{createTime}, #{createDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, battle_report AS battleReport FROM hero_rank_battle WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, attacker_id AS attackerId, attacker_name AS attackerName, attacker_level AS attackerLevel, defender_id AS defenderId, defender_name AS defenderName, defender_level AS defenderLevel, victory, fame_gain AS fameGain, atk_old_rank AS atkOldRank, atk_new_rank AS atkNewRank, def_old_rank AS defOldRank, def_new_rank AS defNewRank, create_time AS createTime, create_date AS createDate FROM hero_rank_battle WHERE attacker_id = #{userId} OR defender_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hero_rank_reward_log (user_id, ranking, fame_reward, silver_reward, settle_date, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{ranking}, #{fameReward}, #{silverReward}, #{settleDate}, #{createTime})
